---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a problem with a core agent, skill agent, or template
labels: bug
---

## Agent or file

Which agent or file has the bug? (e.g. `.github/agents/qaforge-validator.agent.md`)

## What happened

Describe what the agent did that it shouldn't have done, or failed to do.

## What was expected

Describe the correct behavior.

## Repro

Paste the story input (or a minimal version of it) that triggers the bug, and describe which step in the pipeline produced the wrong output.

```
TICKET_ID:
Story summary:
Step where bug occurred:
Agent output (relevant excerpt):
```

## Context files in use

List which context files were present when the bug occurred:
- [ ] PROJECT_CONTEXT.md
- [ ] AUTOMATION_CONTEXT.md
- [ ] API_CONTEXT.md
- [ ] DB_CONTEXT.md
- [ ] UI_CONTEXT.md
- [ ] Skill agent (which one?):
